channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: nexus-xyz/nexus-zkvm
item.description: The Nexus zkVM: The zero-knowledge virtual machine

item.title: jdx/mise
item.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

item.title: casey/just
item.description: 🤖 Just a command runner

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: woodruffw/zizmor
item.description: A static analysis tool for GitHub Actions

item.title: loco-rs/loco
item.description: 🚂 🦀 The one-person framework for Rust for side-projects and startups

item.title: tauri-apps/tauri
item.description: Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop and mobile applications with a web frontend.

item.title: rust-windowing/winit
item.description: Window handling library in pure Rust

item.title: solana-labs/solana
item.description: Web-Scale Blockchain for fast, secure, scalable, decentralized apps and marketplaces.

item.title: awslabs/aws-lambda-web-adapter
item.description: Run web applications on AWS Lambda

item.title: YaLTeR/niri
item.description: A scrollable-tiling Wayland compositor.

item.title: tokio-rs/axum
item.description: Ergonomic and modular web framework built with Tokio, Tower, and Hyper

item.title: qarmin/czkawka
item.description: Multi functional app to find duplicates, empty folders, similar images etc.

item.title: TheAlgorithms/Rust
item.description: All Algorithms implemented in Rust

item.title: wez/wezterm
item.description: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

item.title: aome510/spotify-player
item.description: A Spotify player in the terminal with full feature parity

item.title: alvr-org/ALVR
item.description: Stream VR games from your PC to your headset via Wi-Fi

item.title: Orange-OpenSource/hurl
item.description: Hurl, run and test HTTP requests with plain text.

item.title: LGUG2Z/komorebi
item.description: A tiling window manager for Windows 🍉

item.title: dtolnay/cxx
item.description: Safe interop between Rust and C++

item.title: tensorzero/tensorzero
item.description: TensorZero creates a feedback loop for optimizing LLM applications — turning production data into smarter, faster, and cheaper models.

item.title: katanemo/archgw
item.description: Arch is an intelligent gateway for agents. Engineered with (fast) LLMs for the secure handling, rich observability, and seamless integration of prompts with your APIs - all outside business logic. Built by the core contributors of Envoy proxy, on Envoy.
